chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S- 709 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-8988/2020 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA-8989/2020 4. For hearing of main case 14.12.2020. Mr. Zameer Ahmed Bhutto, advocate for applicant. ==== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted. 4. It is contented by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant on the very date of incident was busy before at Custom Court Karachi, therefore, his involvement in the instant case is doubt full. By contending so, he sought for quashment of the proceedings against the applicant. If, for the sake of argument it is believed that the applicant was actually busy before the Custom Court Karachi then he can prove such fact before learned trial Court at appropriate stage of the trial, such plea with the applicant could hardly be a reason for this Court to quash the proceeding the case against him depriving the prosecution of proving his case against him in accordance with law. Consequent upon above discussion the instant Criminal Misc. Application being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
